title: cerastium durmitoreum
intro: Cerastium durmitoreum, also known as the Durmitor's snow-in-summer, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the carnation family. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cerastium durmitoreum include its ability to alleviate digestive problems, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Cerastium durmitoreum can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
